entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An approach for reorienting agricultural development to address the realities of climate change, focusing on productivity, adaptation, and mitigation

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in global or regional climate patterns that necessitates changes in agricultural development

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving agricultural systems and productivity

entities.name: RESEARCH-FOR-DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Activities aimed at utilizing scarce resources effectively to advance agricultural goals

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: A multi-dimensional aspect of climate-smart agriculture focusing on agricultural output

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: A multi-dimensional aspect of climate-smart agriculture focusing on adjusting to climate change

entities.name: MITIGATION
entities.description: A multi-dimensional aspect of climate-smart agriculture focusing on reducing climate change impacts

entities.name: CLIMATE IMPACTS
entities.description: The effects of climate change that create uncertainty in research prioritization

entities.name: PRIORITY-SETTING FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A proposed system for assessing and comparing agricultural research investments across different scales

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH PROJECTS
entities.description: Specific research initiatives that require prioritization for investment
